source: Local-first PTM/LDA, clustering, stability, and unmixing benchmarks over real spectral datasets

methods.representation: band-frequency count vectors from normalized spectra

stability_protocol.comparison_metric: aligned topic cosine similarity plus top-token jaccard

representation.word: band token repeated by normalized reflectance count

topic_stability_runs.caveat: This first-pass stability view compares aligned topic components across seeds on a compact sample, not full-scene stability under all preprocessing choices.

representation.word: band token repeated by normalized reflectance count

reference_alignment.reference_source: USGS Spectral Library Version 7 compact 224-band group centroids

unlabeled_scene_runs.caveat: Unlabeled topic regimes are exploratory. They are not semantic or mineral labels by themselves.

unmixing_runs.caveat: Scene-specific spectral libraries support mixture-oriented reference checks, not semantic ground truth for every pixel.

spectral_library_runs.dataset_name: USGS Spectral Library Version 7 compact local slices

representation.word: band token repeated by normalized reflectance count
modality band token repeated by normalized sample-mean intensity count
representation.document: one HIDSAG sample built from concatenated mean spectra across swir_low, vnir_low, and vnir_high cubes

hierarchical_representation.word: modality band token repeated by normalized cube-mean intensity count
hierarchical_representation.document: one cube mean spectrum per modality
hierarchical_representation.aggregation: sample-level mean of cube topic mixtures

classification_tasks.label_definition: Highest-abundance non-quartz mineral; labels outside {Phengite, Muscovite} collapse into other-secondary.
